---
name: Alert Field Review
about: Flag a spatial alert that fired incorrectly, missed a real condition, or has a threshold that doesn't match reality on the ground.
title: "Alert Review: [alert name]"
labels: alert-review
assignees: ''
---

**Which alert fired?**
<!-- e.g. Shaded Habitat, Weak Nodes, PFAS Near Habitat -->

**What did it get wrong?**
- [ ] False positive — alert fired but the condition isn't actually a problem here
- [ ] False negative — alert didn't fire but a real problem exists
- [ ] Threshold is off — the distance or value cutoff doesn't match field reality
- [ ] Other

**Approximate location**
<!-- General description is fine — no precise coordinates required -->

**What did you observe in the field?**
<!-- What do you know about this site that the algorithm doesn't? -->

**Suggested correction (optional)**
<!-- If you have a sense of what the threshold or logic should be, note it here -->
